description: All 13 CBC canonical component types. Activation Surface reads this for UIS/CBC selection and validation.

components.name: Hero
components.description: Primary above-the-fold statement. Headline, subhead, primary CTA. First impression surface.
components.creative_mandate: Motion + Depth + Character + Memory all required for creator-facing

components.name: Text Block
components.description: Body content, explanatory copy, supporting narrative. The workhorse of information delivery.

components.name: Image
components.description: Static visual asset. Always carries alt text and loading state.

components.name: Video
components.description: Embedded video with play state, poster frame, and fallback. Supports autoplay rules.

components.name: Call to Action
components.description: Primary conversion trigger. Carries intent signal to EDGE. One per surface recommended.
components.tier_3a_condition: Motion and depth on hover required for all surfaces

components.name: Form
components.description: Input collection. Diagnostic entry, lead capture, subscription. Connected to validation state.

components.name: Offer Stack
components.description: Structured value proposition. Tier comparison, pricing, feature matrix. Decision-enabling layout.

components.name: Social Proof
components.description: Aggregated trust signals. Review counts, logos, certification marks. Validates credibility.

components.name: Testimonial
components.description: Individual attributed statement. Quote, name, role, optional image. Human trust anchor.

components.name: FAQ
components.description: Structured Q&A. Objection handling, clarification, decision support. Collapsible pattern.

components.name: Diagnostic Entry
components.description: Signal collection point. Feeds SCOUT scoring. Qualification gateway before conversion.

components.name: Trust Bar
components.description: Persistent trust strip. Security signals, guarantees, accreditations. Reduces friction at CTA.

components.name: Content Grid
components.description: Structured multi-item layout. Article cards, course listings, signal arrays. Repeatable pattern.

tier_1.label: Canonical — required on every conversion surface

tier_3A.label: Cinematic and immersive — Activation Surface governed
tier_3A.note: Requires DRJ ruling to unlock for any surface

tier_3B.label: Platform infrastructure — mobile, analytics, SEO, AI-native
